message:
fix(acfs info + status wrappers): state_file_path_target_home short-circuit only on explicit ACFS_HOME

Narrow the short-circuit landed in the previous commit. Matching
against the already-resolved `_<wrapper>_RESOLVED_ACFS_HOME` /
`_ACFS_HOME` (i.e. whatever the process managed to derive at startup)
is too broad — if the resolver picked up a user-scoped home that
doesn't match the state file's authoritative user, the short-circuit
would accept the mismatch silently.

Drop the `resolved` arm so only an explicit `_<wrapper>_EXPLICIT_ACFS_HOME`
match bypasses the `getent passwd` validator. The explicit home is
by definition what the caller asked for; any other resolution still
runs through `read_user_for_home` to confirm a real passwd entry
exists.

Applies to `scripts/lib/info.sh` and `scripts/lib/status.sh`. The
other three wrappers (cheatsheet, dashboard, support) already had the
narrower version from the previous pass.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -452,8 +452,7 @@ info_state_file_path_target_home() {
     [[ -n "$data_home" ]] || return 1
     path_home="${data_home%/.acfs}"
 
-    if { [[ -n "$_INFO_RESOLVED_ACFS_HOME" ]] && [[ "$data_home" == "$_INFO_RESOLVED_ACFS_HOME" ]]; } ||
-        { [[ -n "$_INFO_EXPLICIT_ACFS_HOME" ]] && [[ "$data_home" == "$_INFO_EXPLICIT_ACFS_HOME" ]]; }; then
+    if [[ -n "$_INFO_EXPLICIT_ACFS_HOME" ]] && [[ "$data_home" == "$_INFO_EXPLICIT_ACFS_HOME" ]]; then
         printf '%s\n' "$path_home"
         return 0
     fi

@@ -541,8 +541,7 @@ _status_state_file_path_target_home() {
     [[ -n "$data_home" ]] || return 1
     path_home="${data_home%/.acfs}"
 
-    if { [[ -n "${_ACFS_HOME:-}" ]] && [[ "$data_home" == "$_ACFS_HOME" ]]; } ||
-        { [[ -n "$_STATUS_EXPLICIT_ACFS_HOME" ]] && [[ "$data_home" == "$_STATUS_EXPLICIT_ACFS_HOME" ]]; }; then
+    if [[ -n "$_STATUS_EXPLICIT_ACFS_HOME" ]] && [[ "$data_home" == "$_STATUS_EXPLICIT_ACFS_HOME" ]]; then
         printf '%s\n' "$path_home"
         return 0
     fi
